overview: Integrative functional medicine clinic offering bioidentical hormone replacement, peptide therapy, IV infusions, and aesthetic services. Founded in 2011, the practice emphasizes identifying and treating root causes of chronic illness through personalized, science-based treatment plans.
highlights: Specialized expertise in PANS/PANDAS diagnosis and treatment
Multiple IV therapy modalities (Balance, Calm, Defend, Recharge, Restore, Spark, Trim)
targetAudience: Patients seeking functional medicine evaluation and personalized treatment for chronic health conditions, hormone optimization, and wellness.
